response:
Deploying a deep learning model on AWS requires careful planning and execution. * * *  
Model training and validation are conducted on AWS EC2 instances, ensuring computational resources are optimized for performance. *  
Data preprocessing and model tuning are performed using AWS S3 for storage and AWS SageMaker for training. * * *  
Model deployment involves using AWS Elastic Beanstalk or Lambda for scalable hosting, with continuous monitoring via CloudWatch. *  
Security and compliance are addressed through AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) and encryption at rest. *  
Overfitting is mitigated with regularization techniques and cross-validation, while data security is maintained via encrypted data transfers and access controls. *
